item.title: Download AI Text to Speech 1.0.14
item.description: AI TTS is an offline AI-powered text-to-speech application for Windows desktops, enabling quick speech creation on the spot. Paste your script, select a model and voice, create the voice, preview the result, and export the WAV file.
